image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S001. camera intent: comic_panel_01. action beats: 林澈推开公寓门，雨水从外套滴落; 厨房灯突然亮起，林澈愣住; 林澈环顾空荡荡的厨房，表情困惑. narration intent: 旁白 explains "午夜的雨把旧公寓包成一只黑盒。林澈回家时，厨房灯自己亮着。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "我出门前，明明关了灯。". shot positive notes: Night, rain outside window, dim kitchen interior, single overhead light on, young man in wet coat standing in doorway, surprised expression, cinematic lighting, moody atmosphere, film grain.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S001. camera intent: comic_panel_01. action beats: 林澈推开公寓门，雨水从外套滴落; 厨房灯突然亮起，林澈愣住; 林澈环顾空荡荡的厨房，表情困惑. narration intent: 旁白 explains "午夜的雨把旧公寓包成一只黑盒。林澈回家时，厨房灯自己亮着。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "我出门前，明明关了灯。". shot positive notes: Night, rain outside window, dim kitchen interior, single overhead light on, young man in wet coat standing in doorway, surprised expression, cinematic lighting, moody atmosphere, film grain.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, daytime, anime, oversaturated, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 午夜的雨把旧公寓包成一只黑盒。林澈回家时，厨房灯自己亮着。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
